data.name: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete your account?

data.name: As these articles are public assets of the blog/news center, you must first manually delete them or transfer their ownership before you can delete your account.
data.value: As these articles are public assets of the blog/news centre, you must first manually delete them or transfer their ownership before you can delete your account.

data.name: This action will permanently erase your profile and all your comments. This action cannot be undone.
data.value: This action will permanently erase your profile and all your comments. This action cannot be undone.

data.name: You are currently the owner of
data.value: You are currently the owner of

data.name: You cannot delete your account yet.
data.value: You cannot delete your account yet.
